steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “It reminded me of when I was little” directly signals a link between the current experience (hearing Farsi in the car) and a previous memory (his mother’s bedtime chants). This contrast shows the purpose is to draw a connection, not isolate ideas.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D captures the intent of using the present moment to reflect on a past memory. A and C fixate on specific details the text doesn’t emphasize (favorite poets or the mother being a poet). B misinterprets the tone, which is nostalgic, not annoyed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
